SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds

Class Task<A>

java.lang.Object
io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds.Task<A>
Type Parameters:
A - The type of the value produced by the task.
public final class Task<A> extends Object
A purely functional abstraction for an asynchronous computation.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <B> Task<B>
    flatMap(Function<A,Task<B>> fn)

    of(Supplier<A> supplier)
     
    static <A> Task<A>
    of(Supplier<A> supplier, Executor executor)
     
    static <A, B> Task<List<B>>
    parTraverse(List<A> items, Function<A,Task<B>> fn)
    Executes a list of tasks in parallel and collects the results into a single list.
    A
    run()
    Executes the task and blocks until the result is available.
    static <A> Task<Collection<A>>
    sequence(Collection<Task<A>> tasks)
    Converts a collection of tasks into a task of a collection, executing in parallel.
    static <A> Task<A>
    succeed(A value)

    • run

      public A run()
      Executes the task and blocks until the result is available.

    • parTraverse

      public static <A, B> Task<List<B>> parTraverse(List<A> items, Function<A,Task<B>> fn)
      Executes a list of tasks in parallel and collects the results into a single list.

    • sequence

      public static <A> Task<Collection<A>> sequence(Collection<Task<A>> tasks)
      Converts a collection of tasks into a task of a collection, executing in parallel.
